hooks.hook_text: POV: you just walked inside Starry Night and your brain can't process what's happening
hooks.visual_opener: Person standing frozen as swirling stars move across their face
hooks.psychological_trigger: Disbelief and wonder at impossible experience

hooks.hook_text: POV: you're surrounded by Van Gogh's sunflowers and they're 20 feet tall
hooks.visual_opener: Slow pan up massive sunflower petals wrapping around viewer

hooks.hook_text: POV: you just became part of a Van Gogh painting and forgot you're in 2024
This looks like a regular room... wait for it
hooks.visual_opener: Plain white walls, person walking in casually

hooks.hook_text: She thought she was just going to see some paintings... wait for the transformation
hooks.visual_opener: Person entering with normal expectations, checking phone

hooks.hook_text: 200 paintings. Massive walls. Classical music. Wait until you see what happens next
hooks.visual_opener: Quick cuts building tension before the full immersion reveal
hooks.psychological_trigger: Mounting excitement and sensory overload anticipation

hooks.hook_text: Her face when she realized she was standing inside The Bedroom
hooks.visual_opener: Close-up of genuine shock and awe expression

hooks.hook_text: His reaction to walking through brushstrokes the size of his body
hooks.visual_opener: Man's jaw dropping as massive brushstrokes move around him

hooks.hook_text: Watch their faces the moment Starry Night starts moving around them
hooks.visual_opener: Multiple people's expressions changing from curious to stunned

hooks.hook_text: Can you walk through Starry Night without getting emotional?
hooks.visual_opener: Person trying to stay composed as stars swirl overhead

hooks.hook_text: Try not to cry when the sunflowers start blooming around you
hooks.visual_opener: Sunflowers emerging and growing in real-time projection

hooks.hook_text: Can you find yourself in this Van Gogh painting?
hooks.visual_opener: Person searching for their silhouette among the projections

hooks.hook_text: This closes in 2 weeks and you still haven't walked through a masterpiece
hooks.visual_opener: Calendar countdown over breathtaking exhibition footage

hooks.hook_text: Everyone's posting this and you're still looking at Van Gogh in textbooks
hooks.visual_opener: Split screen: flat textbook image vs immersive experience

hooks.hook_text: 200 Van Gogh paintings at massive scale and you're scrolling instead of going
hooks.visual_opener: Phone screen showing social media, then pull back to reveal exhibition
